scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/language-spec && npm run language-assets:check && npm run build --workspace packages/parser && npm run build --workspace packages/formatter && npm run build --workspace packages/vscode && npm run build --workspace packages/language-server
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspace packages/language-spec && npm run test --workspace packages/parser && npm run test --workspace packages/formatter && npm run test --workspace packages/vscode && npm run test --workspace packages/language-server && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.language-assets:generate: npm run build --workspace packages/language-spec && node scripts/generate-language-assets.js
